description: Business letter in Hebrew. Dating: likely 16th century. On verso there is a note reading "copy of the letters which I wrote to Venice to כודכודא(?)." Mentions a sum of peraḥīm (i.e. ducats) in line 12; the name Sulaymān (סולמאן) in l. 13; a Muslim (מיסלמאן) in l. 15; and "to the Senyora, the wife of R. S[...]" in the last line.
description_he: מכתב בעברית ל-Venice. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
